title: Cells in a Range on an Excel Sheet
titleCn: Excel 表中某个范围内的单元格

testcases.input: s = "K1:L2" Output: ["K1","K2","L1","L2"] Explanation: The above diagram shows the cells which should be present in the list. The red arrows denote the order in which the cells should be presented.
testcases.expectedOutput: ["K1","K2","L1","L2"] Explanation: The above diagram shows the cells which should be present in the list. The red arrows denote the order in which the cells should be presented.

testcases.input: s = "A1:F1" Output: ["A1","B1","C1","D1","E1","F1"] Explanation: The above diagram shows the cells which should be present in the list. The red arrow denotes the order in which the cells should be presented.
testcases.expectedOutput: ["A1","B1","C1","D1","E1","F1"] Explanation: The above diagram shows the cells which should be present in the list. The red arrow denotes the order in which the cells should be presented.
